title: Void Tales
description: A Modpack perfect for enjoying our Void Tales server without using Optifine! ⚡
body:
## 🎮 **Void Tales Modpack** — Perfect for enjoying Void Tales

In brings you smoother gameplay *and* full OptiFine-style features!
It boosts your **FPS significantly more** than OptiFine, while staying fully compatible with all your favorite features.

🛠️ **Built with top-tier optimization mods**, including:
- Sodium
- C2ME
- MoreCulling
- FerritCore
- Krypton
- ...

✨ **Packed with familiar features** like:
- Zoom
- Model & Entity Features
- Capes
- Dynamic Lights
- Continuity
- Dynamic FPS
- ...

🎁 **Bonus mods** for an even better experience:
- No Telemetry
- Fabrishot
- Borderless Fullscreen
- ...

Yes, **shaders are supported** too!

Get the modpack [*here*](https://modrinth.com/modpack/void-tales/versions)!

Need help setting everything up with your favorite launcher?
📩 Message @Hyphonical for assistance!

> Already have (some of) these mods? Great! Just make sure all essential OptiFine-replacement mods are installed and updated.
